results.name: enwiki-aseleste-purger
results.title: Purger
results.description: Purge (with options) or null edit pages.

results.name: enwiki-aveaoz-automobileredirect
results.title: AutoMobileRedirect
results.description: Automatically redirects to desktop site when mobile links are opened on desktop. It does not change the behavior on mobile devices (unless desktop mode is enabled).

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-answer-edit-requests-tool
results.title: Answer Edit Requests tool
results.description: Adds a [[Special:BlankPage/EditProtected|special page]] where you can process and answer edit requests.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-catman
results.title: CatMan
results.description: A category manager (similar to HotCat) powered by [[mw:OOUI|OOUI]].

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-copycodeblock-2
results.title: CopyCodeBlock (2)
results.description: Allows for copying of code blocks. Originally developed on Fandom but merges later [[User:Nardog/CopyCodeBlock]]. Adds a few enhancements including double copy prevention to avoid redundant entries in a clipboard manager. Requires browser clipboard permissions to use.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-detectprotectionlevels
results.title: DetectProtectionLevels
results.description: Shows protection icons on all protected pages, including those missing {{tl|pp-protected}}. Also "unlocks" protection icons on pages where one has permission to edit.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-discussiontoolswordcount
results.title: discussiontoolswordcount
results.description: Gets per author word counts of discussions, activatable by a single link.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-doctaghighlighter
results.title: doctaghighlighter
results.description: Colors JSDoc and LDoc tags in JavaScript and Lua files.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-edit-requestor
results.title: Edit Requestor
results.description: Constructs diff-formatted edit requests after clicking on a "Submit an edit request" link.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-infiniscroll
results.title: infiniscroll
results.description: Adds infinite scrolling to contributions, page histories, and log pages.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-link-info
results.title: Link Info
results.description: Adds a custom right-click context menu to various useful internal links.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-my-links
results.title: My Links
results.description: Allows the use of WikiText to put links (and other text) into the sidebar.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-noeditredlinks
results.title: noeditredlinks
results.description: Stops the opening of the editor when clicking on red links.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-quickcreate
results.title: quickcreate
results.description: Create pages in-place without leaving the page. Useful for creating multiple pages from a special page list or from the categories list on a page.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-quicknote
results.title: quicknote
results.description: Adds a "quick note" button to diffs that allows for leaving personal messages to editors regarding an edit that an editor has made.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-rc-notify
results.title: RC Notify
results.description: Adds in-browser notifications about potentially harmful edits to [[Special:RecentChanges]].

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-rc-patrol
results.title: RC Patrol
results.description: Browse through recent changes in browser for easy patrolling and reversion.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-rcwidget
results.title: RCWidget
results.description: Adds a widget to the sidebar allowing for the patrolling of recent changes.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-redirect-creator
results.title: Redirect Creator
results.description: Allows for the two-click creation of redirects from any [[Special:Search|search]] page and allows for the fast creation of multiple redirects.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-rollback-no-leave
results.title: Rollback No Leave
results.description: Revert edits made by users, but without navigating to the page where the rollback diff is shown.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-save-draft
results.title: Save Draft
results.description: Adds a button that saves a draft of the page you are currently editing to your computer browser's storage so you can return to editing later.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-search-engine
results.title: Search Engine
results.description: Adds buttons to search Wikipedia using Google and Bing.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-usergroups
results.title: usergroups
results.description: Adds user groups and information about current blocks underneath the username.

results.name: enwiki-awesome-aasim-xfd-voting-tool
results.title: XFD Voting tool
results.description: Makes it easier to vote to keep/delete/comment on XfDs.

results.name: enwiki-bawolff-wiktlookup
results.title: wiktLookup
results.description: Double-click a word, and go to its definition on [[Wiktionary]].

results.name: enwiki-begoon-adduploadslink
results.title: addUploadsLink
results.description: Adds a "User file uploads" link to the toolbox, under "User contributions", providing access to a thumbnailed listing of files uploaded by the user whose userspace, talkspace or contributions list you are viewing (as is available at Commons).

results.name: enwiki-bellezzasolo-ajax-rollback-with-summary
results.title: Ajax Rollback, with summary
results.description: Adds AJAX rollback links next to the ordinary, offers edit summaries.

results.name: enwiki-bellezzasolo-arbritration-requests-buddy
results.title: Arbritration Requests Buddy
results.description: Adds a Twinkle menu for discretionary sanction notices, as well as more Arbcom-themed functions.

results.name: enwiki-bellezzasolo-subpages
results.title: Subpages
results.description: Add a "Subpages" link to the toolbox, which shows subpages of the current page.

results.name: enwiki-bellezzasolo-user-highlighter-v20
results.title: User Highlighter v2.0
results.description: Highlights users by user group.

results.name: enwiki-bethnaught-hidesectiondesktop
results.title: hideSectionDesktop
results.description: Enables level 2 sections to be collapsed in the desktop view, like in mobile. Adds a [toggle visibility] link to each section header.

results.name: enwiki-bility-convert-from-24-hour
results.title: Convert from 24-hour
results.description: Changes times in user contributions and history pages to use 12-hour AM/PM clock.

results.name: enwiki-bility-status-updater
results.title: Status updater
results.description: Click on a status from a list visible to you or everyone to change your status.

results.name: enwiki-billedmammal-move
results.title: Move+
results.description: An expanded version of TheTVExpert's rmCloser script.

results.name: enwiki-blue-haired-lawyer-wide-skin
results.title: Wide Skin
results.description: Hides the sidebar and transfers its links to menus and the footer. Tested with the Vector skin.

results.name: enwiki-bob-externals
results.title: externals
results.description: Replaces the external link icon with the corresponding [[favicon]] for some sites.

results.name: enwiki-bradv-endlesscontribs
results.title: endlesscontribs
results.description: Provides for endless scrolling of contributions pages.

results.name: enwiki-bradv-expanddiffs
results.title: ExpandDiffs
results.description: Loads diffs inline on history, contributions, and recent changes pages.

results.name: enwiki-bradv-notepad
results.title: Notepad
results.description: Shows a notepad panel that allows you to save arbitrary text.

results.name: enwiki-bradv-superlinks
results.title: Superlinks
results.description: Quickly view information related to the page.

results.name: enwiki-bradv-whatlinksheresnippets
results.title: WhatLinksHereSnippets
results.description: Shows snippets of code for transcluded templates where they are used.

results.name: enwiki-brandonbot-highlight-admins
results.title: Highlight Admins
results.description: Highlight administrators using a single CSS file, avoiding [[flash of unstyled content|flashes of unstyled content]].

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-addcopied
results.title: AddCopied
results.description: Tool that adds {{tl|Copied}} to the source and target talk pages when [[Wikipedia:Copying within Wikipedia|copying content within Wikipedia]].

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-ajaxundo
results.title: AJAXUndo
results.description: Adds an Ajax undo link next to the normal undo link on page histories and on diff pages, and reloads the page after undoing.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-autoref
results.title: Autoref
results.description: Allows for the inserting of auto generating refersuing using [[wp:Citoid]] in the 2010 wikitext editor, like you can in the visual editor.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-citationstylemarker
results.title: CitationStyleMarker
results.description: Show the citation style of a citation beside the citation.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-collapsesections
results.title: CollapseSections
results.description: Adds a button to collapse sections like on mobile.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-comparerevisions
results.title: CompareRevisions
results.description: Adds a button to the diff page to compare the two revisions side-by-side.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-contribsbypage
results.title: ContribsByPage
results.description: Script to sort contributions by page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-cssimagecrop
results.title: CSSImageCrop
results.description: A utility to visually use [[Template:CSS image crop]].

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-easysummary
results.title: EasySummary
results.description: Use the last summary you used or load and save a summary.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-ffuhelper
results.title: FFUHelper
results.description: Helper script that is designed to work with [[Wikipedia:Files for upload]].

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-findsources
results.title: FindSources
results.description: Adds a bar below the page title to find sources using {{tl|Find sources mainspace}}.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-float-head
results.title: Float Head
results.description: Makes the Wikipedia head navigation floating.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-float-side
results.title: Float Side
results.description: Makes the Wikipedia side panel floating.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-floatingtoc
results.title: FloatingTOC
results.description: Collapsible floating [[Help:Section#Table of contents (TOC)|Table of Contents]], with formatting closer to standard TOC.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-global-preferences
results.title: Global Preferences
results.description: Adds a link to edit global preferences.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-green-redirects
results.title: Green Redirects
results.description: Makes redirects green.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-hotdefaultsort
results.title: HotDefaultSort
results.description: Adds buttons beside the default sort key to add/modify/remove the default sort key.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-incrementparameters
results.title: IncrementParameters
results.description: Utility to easily increment numbered parameters.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-invert
results.title: Invert
results.description: Adds a link to invert the colour of all Wikipedia pages.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-listsorter
results.title: ListSorter
results.description: Adds a link to sort all bullet lists on a page alphabetically.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-mobile-view
results.title: Mobile View
results.description: Adds a link to view mobile version of page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-morediffinfo
results.title: MoreDiffInfo
results.description: Adds more information to diff pages such as revision ID, size, and ORES score.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-noredirect
results.title: NoRedirect
results.description: Adds a ("no redirect") link to all links to redirects that links directly to the page, skipping the redirect.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-nulledit
results.title: NullEdit
results.description: Adds a link to perform a [[WP:NULLEDIT|null edit]] on the current page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-parameterspacing
results.title: ParameterSpacing
results.description: A utility to manage the spacing around the = for parameters of a template.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-portletlinks
results.title: PortletLinks
results.description: A script to manage and create custom portlet links (links in the toolbar, sidebar etc.) without knowledge of JavaScript.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-quickedit
results.title: QuickEdit
results.description: Edit a section of a page without leaving the page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-redirectnotification
results.title: RedirectNotification
results.description: Get notified when you are redirected, allowing you to view the redirect page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-restorer
results.title: Restorer
results.description: Adds a link beside the undo link in page history to restore a revision of an page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-show-revision-id
results.title: Show Revision ID
results.description: Adds the revision ID to each revision on history, contribution, and watchlist pages.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-show-templates
results.title: Show Templates
results.description: Add a link to view what template calls are producing what parts of the page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-showusergender
results.title: ShowUserGender
results.description: Shows the gender of a user beside their name.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-subpagemover
results.title: SubpageMover
results.description: Adds a button to move a page and its subpages to [[Special:MovePage]].

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-subpages
results.title: Subpages
results.description: Adds a sub pages link in the personal toolbar.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-svgeditor
results.title: SVGEditor
results.description: Adds a button on SVG file pages to view and edit the SVG source code.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-testwikitext
results.title: TestWikitext
results.description: Adds a page that quickly parses/previews, loads, edits, and saves wikitext. Good as a quick page to test some code. Uses the browser storage.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-to-bottom
results.title: To Bottom
results.description: Adds a link to the bottom of the page in the right navigation menu.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-to-top
results.title: To Top
results.description: Adds a link to the top of the page in the footer.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-to-top-button
results.title: To Top Button
results.description: Adds a button to go to the top of the page to the bottom right corner of the page.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-todolist
results.title: TodoList
results.description: Adds a todo list link to the head. The link will open a popup that allows you to view, add to, and modify your todo list. The todo list is stored in your user options, so it's private.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-togglesidebar
results.title: ToggleSidebar
results.description: Adds a link to toggle the sidebar (only testing for Vector).

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-update-notifications
results.title: Update Notifications
results.description: Updates the alert and notification counts every few seconds.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-watchdoc
results.title: WatchDoc
results.description: Automatically watch/unwatch the documentation page of a template (and its talk page) when you watch/unwatch a template.

results.name: enwiki-brandonxlf-what-links-here
results.title: What Links Here
results.description: Adds a WhatLinksHere link in the personal toolbar (Note: There's one in the left toolbar already).

results.name: enwiki-bugghost-userroleindicator
results.title: UserRoleIndicator
results.description: Fork of UserHighlighterSimple. Displays small user-role labels on userlinks instead of highlighting. These labels can be customised - by default they are emojis (eg. 🐣 for new users, 🧹 for admins, ⚖️ for arbcom members, etc), but users can change these to be custom text labels.

results.name: enwiki-caburum-utcclock
results.title: UTCclock
results.description: Adds a clock displaying the current UTC time

results.name: enwiki-canonni-alertassistant
results.title: AlertAssistant
results.description: Easily alert users about [[WP:contentious topics|contentious topics]]. Supports {{tl|Alert}} and {{tl|Alert/first}}.

results.name: enwiki-canonni-statussetter
results.title: StatusSetter
results.description: Modified version of Enterprisey's script. Uses a dropdown menu and supports all statuses.

results.name: enwiki-canonni-votevisualizer
results.title: VoteVisualizer
results.description: An improved version of [[User:Pythoncoder/Scripts/voteSymbols]].

results.name: enwiki-caorongjin-word-count
results.title: Word Count
results.description: Adds a link to the sidebar's toolbox to view various page size statistics. A variant on [[User:Dr pda/prosesize|Prose Size]] that offers actual counting of words rather than counting [[whitespace character]]s, and handles separate counting of references.

results.name: enwiki-captain-medusa-did-you-know
results.title: Did You Know
results.description: Adds a Did You Know link in to the top toolbar.

results.name: enwiki-cfa-attributetranslation
results.title: AttributeTranslation
results.description: A tool that adds attribution to articles with non-attributed translations of other Wikipedias (useful for NPP reviewing).

results.name: enwiki-chaotic-enby-recent-unblock-highlighter
results.title: Recent Unblock Highlighter
results.description: Allows administrators to temporarily highlight users they unblock per [[WP:ROPE]] to keep track of them, and allows everyone to see the highlighted users.

results.name: enwiki-chew-highlightquotes
results.title: HighlightQuotes
results.description: Simple script that highlights anything between quotes ("). Adds to Wiki tools sidebar, click to show.

results.name: enwiki-chlod-attribution-notice-template-editor
results.title: Attribution Notice Template Editor
results.description: Graphically edit content attribution notices (e.g., {{T|copied}}, {{T|translated page}}, {{T|merged-to}}, etc.). Part of [[User:Chlod/Scripts/Deputy|Deputy]].

results.name: enwiki-chlod-coordinator
results.title: Coordinator
results.description: Quickly add and edit {{tl|coord}} and {{tl|coord missing}} templates.

results.name: enwiki-chlod-deputy
results.title: Deputy
results.description: Copyright cleanup toolkit. Provides an interface for editing [[Wikipedia:Contributor copyright investigations]] pages. Also includes the [[User:Chlod/Scripts/Deputy/AttributionNoticeTemplateEditor|Attribution Notice Template Editor]] and [[User:Chlod/Scripts/Deputy/InfringementAssistant|Infringement Assistant]] by default.

results.name: enwiki-chlod-fold-archives
results.title: Fold Archives
results.description: Collapses archived talk page threads to reduce taken screen space.
